classes.name: langevals_langevals.similarity.CustomSimilarityEvaluator
documentation:
Allows you to check for semantic similarity or dissimilarity between input and output and a
target value, so you can avoid sentences that you don't want to be present without having to
match on the exact text.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.product_sentiment_polarity.ProductSentimentPolarityEvaluator
documentation: For messages about products, this evaluator checks for the nuanced sentiment direction of the LLM output, either very positive, subtly positive, subtly negative, or very negative.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.valid_format.ValidFormatEvaluator
documentation:
Allows you to check if the output is a valid json, markdown, python, sql, etc.
For JSON, can optionally validate against a provided schema.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.llm_category.CustomLLMCategoryEvaluator
documentation: Use an LLM as a judge with a custom prompt to classify the message into custom defined categories.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.llm_boolean.CustomLLMBooleanEvaluator
documentation: Use an LLM as a judge with a custom prompt to do a true/false boolean evaluation of the message.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.query_resolution.QueryResolutionEvaluator
documentation: This evaluator checks if all the user queries in the conversation were resolved. Useful to detect when the bot doesn't know how to answer or can't help the user.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.competitor_llm.CompetitorLLMEvaluator
documentation: This evaluator use an LLM-as-judge to check if the conversation is related to competitors, without having to name them explicitly

classes.name: langevals_langevals.basic.CustomBasicEvaluator
documentation: Allows you to check for simple text matches or regex evaluation.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.llm_score.CustomLLMScoreEvaluator
documentation: Use an LLM as a judge with custom prompt to do a numeric score evaluation of the message.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.competitor_llm_function_call.CompetitorLLMFunctionCallEvaluator
documentation: This evaluator implements LLM-as-a-judge with a function call approach to check if the message contains a mention of a competitor.

classes.name: langevals_langevals.competitor_blocklist.CompetitorBlocklistEvaluator
documentation: This evaluator checks if any of the specified competitors was mentioned

classes.name: langevals_langevals.off_topic.OffTopicEvaluator

class_variables.name: langevals_langevals.off_topic.OffTopicEvaluator.is_guardrail
documentation: If the evaluator is a guardrail or not, a guardrail evaluator must return a boolean result on the `passed` result field in addition to the score
This evaluator checks if the user message is concerning one of the allowed topics of the chatbot
